description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a yellow-to-orange gradient canvas upper, featuring bright red laces threaded through black metal eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern. The toe cap and sole are made of white rubber, with a black stripe running along the midsole. On the inner side, there is a circular Converse All Star logo patch in white, blue, and black. The shoe has a classic urban streetwear style, with a slightly glossy finish on the rubber parts and a matte, textured canvas body. The interior appears hollow, typical for footwear, and the shoe is designed for comfort and durability in everyday urban environments.
description: A yellow-orange high-top sneaker with red laces, white rubber toe cap and sole, and a visible Converse All Star logo patch. The shoe combines canvas and rubber materials for a classic, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red criss-cross laces, white rubber toe cap, and the symmetrical shape of the shoe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gradient canvas, red laces, black eyelets, and the black stripe on the sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical seam, the gradient color transition, and the black heel stripe.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the Converse All Star logo patch, red laces, and the full profile of the shoe.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner side, white with blue and black details
